channel.title: Chrome — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Chrome (chrome).

item.title: CVE-2026-10022 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Type Confusion in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed an attacker who convinced a user to install a malicious extension to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted Chrome Extension. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-10021 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in USB in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-10020 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Skia in Google Chrome on Android prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium secur…

item.title: CVE-2026-10019 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Integer overflow in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-10018 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Integer overflow in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-10017 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds read in Headless in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-10016 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in DOM in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10015 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Integer overflow in WTF in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10014 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in WebMIDI in Google Chrome on Android prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10013 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in WebCodecs in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10012 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Skia in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10011 · 3.1 LOW 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Skia in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10010 · 5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Input in Google Chrome on Android prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to bypass site isolation via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10009 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Integer overflow in Skia in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10008 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Uninitialized Use in GPU in Google Chrome on Android prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10007 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in SVG in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10006 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Race in WebAudio in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10005 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in WebAppInstalls in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10004 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Passwords in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10003 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10002 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10001 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PerformanceManager in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-10000 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Passwords in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9999 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in ANGLE in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9998 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Integer overflow in Skia in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9997 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Input in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9996 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds read in WebRTC in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9995 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in WebXR in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9994 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Core in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9993 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9992 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Network in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9991 · 3.1 LOW 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Media in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9990 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in WebAppInstalls in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security sever…

item.title: CVE-2026-9989 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Media in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to bypass same origin policy via a crafted video file. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9988 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in WebRTC in Google Chrome on Linux prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9987 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in WebAppInstalls in Google Chrome on Android prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via a malicious file. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9986 · 4.2 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in OptimizationGuide in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: H…

item.title: CVE-2026-9985 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Media in Google Chrome on ChromeOS prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted…

item.title: CVE-2026-9984 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in UI in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9983 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Type Confusion in Skia in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9982 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severi…

item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Skia in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9980 · 5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Printing in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to bypass site isolation via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9979 · 5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Input in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to bypass site isolation via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9978 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Glic in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9977 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in WebShare in Google Chrome on Android prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium s…

item.title: CVE-2026-9976 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in USB in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9975 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds read and write in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9974 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds write in GPU in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-9973 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds write in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 148.0.7778.216 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)
